duas.title: Morning Remembrance
duas.arabic: أَصْبَحْنَا وَأَصْبَحَ الْمُلْكُ لِلَّهِ وَالْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ، لَهُ الْمُلْكُ وَلَهُ الْحَمْدُ وَهُوَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ
duas.transliteration: Asbahna wa asbahal-mulku lillah, walhamdu lillah, la ilaha illallahu wahdahu la shareeka lah, lahul-mulku wa lahul-hamdu wa huwa 'ala kulli shay'in qadeer
duas.translation: We have reached the morning and at this very time the whole kingdom belongs to Allah. All praise is due to Allah. None has the right to be worshipped except Allah, alone, without partner. To Him belongs all sovereignty and praise, and He is over all things omnipotent.

duas.title: Master of Forgiveness (Sayyid al-Istighfar)
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ أَنْتَ رَبِّي لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ خَلَقْتَنِي وَأَنَا عَبْدُكَ وَأَنَا عَلَى عَهْدِكَ وَوَعْدِكَ مَا اسْتَطَعْتُ أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شَرِّ مَا صَنَعْتُ أَبُوءُ لَكَ بِنِعْمَتِكَ عَلَيَّ وَأَبُوءُ بِذَنْبِي فَاغْفِرْ لِي فَإِنَّهُ لَا يَغْفِرُ الذُّنُوبَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma anta rabbi la ilaha illa anta, khalaqtani wa ana 'abduka, wa ana 'ala 'ahdika wa wa'dika mastata'tu, a'udhu bika min sharri ma sana'tu, abu'u laka bini'matika 'alayya, wa abu'u bidhanbi, faghfir li, fa innahu la yaghfirudh-dhunuba illa anta
duas.translation: O Allah, You are my Lord, none has the right to be worshipped except You. You created me and I am Your servant, and I abide by Your covenant and promise as best I can. I seek refuge in You from the evil of what I have done. I acknowledge Your favour upon me, and I acknowledge my sin, so forgive me, for verily none can forgive sins except You.

duas.title: Protection Morning Dua
duas.arabic: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الَّذِي لَا يَضُرُّ مَعَ اسْمِهِ شَيْءٌ فِي الْأَرْضِ وَلَا فِي السَّمَاءِ وَهُوَ السَّمِيعُ الْعَلِيمُ
duas.transliteration: Bismillahilladhi la yadurru ma'asmihi shay'un fil-ardi wa la fis-sama'i wa huwas-sami'ul-'aleem
duas.translation: In the name of Allah, with whose name nothing can cause harm in the earth or in the heavens, and He is the All-Hearing, the All-Knowing.

duas.title: Evening Remembrance
duas.arabic: أَمْسَيْنَا وَأَمْسَى الْمُلْكُ لِلَّهِ وَالْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ، لَهُ الْمُلْكُ وَلَهُ الْحَمْدُ وَهُوَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ
duas.transliteration: Amsayna wa amsal-mulku lillah walhamdu lillah, la ilaha illallahu wahdahu la shareeka lah, lahul-mulku wa lahul-hamdu wa huwa 'ala kulli shay'in qadeer
duas.translation: We have reached the evening and at this very time the whole kingdom belongs to Allah. All praise is due to Allah. None has the right to be worshipped except Allah, alone, without partner. To Him belongs all sovereignty and praise, and He is over all things omnipotent.

duas.title: Evening Protection
duas.arabic: أَعُوذُ بِكَلِمَاتِ اللَّهِ التَّامَّاتِ مِنْ شَرِّ مَا خَلَقَ
duas.transliteration: A'udhu bikalimatillahit-tammati min sharri ma khalaq
duas.translation: I seek refuge in the perfect words of Allah from the evil of what He has created.

duas.title: Opening Supplication in Prayer
duas.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ اللَّهُمَّ وَبِحَمْدِكَ وَتَبَارَكَ اسْمُكَ وَتَعَالَى جَدُّكَ وَلَا إِلَهَ غَيْرُكَ
duas.transliteration: Subhanakallahumma wa bihamdika wa tabarakasmuka wa ta'ala jadduka wa la ilaha ghairuk
duas.translation: Glory be to You, O Allah, and all praises are due unto You, and blessed is Your name, and exalted is Your majesty, and there is no deity worthy of worship except You.

duas.title: Between Sujud (Prostrations)
duas.arabic: رَبِّ اغْفِرْ لِي رَبِّ اغْفِرْ لِي
duas.transliteration: Rabbighfir li, Rabbighfir li
duas.translation: My Lord, forgive me. My Lord, forgive me.

duas.title: Dua in Sujud
duas.arabic: سُبْحَانَ رَبِّيَ الْأَعْلَى
duas.transliteration: Subhana Rabbiyal-A'la
duas.translation: Glory is to my Lord, the Most High.

duas.title: Istighfar After Prayer
duas.arabic: أَسْتَغْفِرُ اللَّهَ
duas.transliteration: Astaghfirullah
duas.translation: I seek forgiveness from Allah.

duas.title: SubhanAllah After Prayer
duas.arabic: سُبْحَانَ اللَّهِ
duas.transliteration: SubhanAllah
duas.translation: Glory be to Allah.

duas.title: Alhamdulillah After Prayer
duas.arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ
duas.transliteration: Alhamdulillah
duas.translation: All praise is due to Allah.

duas.title: Allahu Akbar After Prayer
duas.arabic: اللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ
duas.transliteration: Allahu Akbar
duas.translation: Allah is the Greatest.

duas.title: Ayat al-Kursi After Prayer
duas.arabic: اللَّهُ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا هُوَ الْحَيُّ الْقَيُّومُ
duas.transliteration: Allahu la ilaha illa Huwal-Hayyul-Qayyum...
duas.translation: Allah! There is no deity except Him, the Ever-Living, the Sustainer of existence... (full Ayat al-Kursi, Quran 2:255)

duas.title: Before Sleeping
duas.arabic: بِاسْمِكَ اللَّهُمَّ أَمُوتُ وَأَحْيَا
duas.transliteration: Bismika Allahumma amutu wa ahya
duas.translation: In Your name, O Allah, I die and I live.

duas.title: Upon Waking Up
duas.arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي أَحْيَانَا بَعْدَ مَا أَمَاتَنَا وَإِلَيْهِ النُّشُورُ
duas.transliteration: Alhamdu lillahilladhi ahyana ba'da ma amatana wa ilaihin-nushur
duas.translation: All praise is for Allah who gave us life after having taken it from us, and unto Him is the resurrection.

duas.title: Before Eating
duas.arabic: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ
duas.transliteration: Bismillah
duas.translation: In the name of Allah.

duas.title: After Eating
duas.arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي أَطْعَمَنِي هَذَا وَرَزَقَنِيهِ مِنْ غَيْرِ حَوْلٍ مِنِّي وَلَا قُوَّةٍ
duas.transliteration: Alhamdu lillahilladhi at'amani hadha wa razaqanihi min ghayri hawlin minni wa la quwwah
duas.translation: All praise is for Allah who fed me this and provided it for me without any might or power from myself.

duas.title: Forgetting Bismillah Before Eating
duas.arabic: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ أَوَّلَهُ وَآخِرَهُ
duas.transliteration: Bismillahi awwalahu wa akhirah
duas.translation: In the name of Allah at its beginning and at its end.

duas.title: Travel Dua
duas.arabic: سُبْحَانَ الَّذِي سَخَّرَ لَنَا هَذَا وَمَا كُنَّا لَهُ مُقْرِنِينَ وَإِنَّا إِلَى رَبِّنَا لَمُنْقَلِبُونَ
duas.transliteration: Subhanal-ladhi sakh-khara lana hadha wa ma kunna lahu muqrinin wa inna ila Rabbina lamunqalibun
duas.translation: Glory to Him who has subjected this to us, and we could never have it by our efforts, and verily to our Lord we shall return.

duas.title: Entering a Town or City
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ رَبَّ السَّمَوَاتِ السَّبْعِ وَمَا أَظْلَلْنَ وَرَبَّ الْأَرَضِينَ السَّبْعِ وَمَا أَقْلَلْنَ وَرَبَّ الشَّيَاطِينِ وَمَا أَضْلَلْنَ وَرَبَّ الرِّيَاحِ وَمَا ذَرَيْنَ أَسْأَلُكَ خَيْرَ هَذِهِ الْقَرْيَةِ وَخَيْرَ أَهْلِهَا وَخَيْرَ مَا فِيهَا وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شَرِّهَا وَشَرِّ أَهْلِهَا وَشَرِّ مَا فِيهَا
duas.transliteration: Allahumma Rabbas-samawatis-sab'i wa ma adhlalna, wa Rabbal-aradeenas-sab'i wa ma aqlalna, wa Rabbash-shayateeni wa ma adlalna, wa Rabbar-riyahi wa ma dharayna, as'aluka khayra hadhihil-qaryati wa khayra ahliha wa khayra ma fiha, wa a'udhu bika min sharriha wa sharri ahliha wa sharri ma fiha
duas.translation: O Allah, Lord of the seven heavens and all that they envelop, Lord of the seven earths and all that they carry, Lord of the devils and all whom they misguide, Lord of the winds and all whom they whisk away. I ask You for the goodness of this town, the goodness of its people and the goodness of what is in it. I seek refuge in You from its evil, the evil of its people and the evil of what is in it.

duas.title: Leaving the Home
duas.arabic: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ تَوَكَّلْتُ عَلَى اللَّهِ وَلَا حَوْلَ وَلَا قُوَّةَ إِلَّا بِاللَّهِ
duas.transliteration: Bismillah, tawakkaltu 'alallah, wa la hawla wa la quwwata illa billah
duas.translation: In the name of Allah, I place my trust in Allah, and there is no might nor power except with Allah.

duas.title: Entering the Home
duas.arabic: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ وَلَجْنَا وَبِسْمِ اللَّهِ خَرَجْنَا وَعَلَى اللَّهِ رَبِّنَا تَوَكَّلْنَا
duas.transliteration: Bismillahi walajna, wa bismillahi kharajna, wa 'ala Allahi Rabbina tawakkalna
duas.translation: In the name of Allah we enter, in the name of Allah we leave, and upon our Lord we place our trust.

duas.title: Entering the Masjid
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ افْتَحْ لِي أَبْوَابَ رَحْمَتِكَ
duas.transliteration: Allahummaf-tah li abwaba rahmatik
duas.translation: O Allah, open for me the doors of Your mercy.

duas.title: Leaving the Masjid
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ فَضْلِكَ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma inni as'aluka min fadlik
duas.translation: O Allah, I ask You from Your favour.

duas.title: Dua for Distress
duas.arabic: لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ الْعَظِيمُ الْحَلِيمُ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ رَبُّ الْعَرْشِ الْعَظِيمِ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ رَبُّ السَّمَوَاتِ وَرَبُّ الْأَرْضِ وَرَبُّ الْعَرْشِ الْكَرِيمِ
duas.transliteration: La ilaha illallahul-'Adheemul-Haleem, la ilaha illallahu Rabbul-'Arshil-'Adheem, la ilaha illallahu Rabbus-samawati wa Rabbul-ardi wa Rabbul-'Arshil-Kareem
duas.translation: None has the right to be worshipped except Allah, the Mighty, the Forbearing. None has the right to be worshipped except Allah, Lord of the magnificent throne. None has the right to be worshipped except Allah, Lord of the heavens, Lord of the earth, and Lord of the noble throne.

duas.title: Dua of Yunus (Jonah)
duas.arabic: لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ سُبْحَانَكَ إِنِّي كُنْتُ مِنَ الظَّالِمِينَ
duas.transliteration: La ilaha illa anta subhanaka inni kuntu minadh-dhalimeen
duas.translation: There is no deity except You; exalted are You. Indeed, I have been of the wrongdoers.

duas.title: When Anxious or Worried
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْهَمِّ وَالْحَزَنِ وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْعَجْزِ وَالْكَسَلِ وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْجُبْنِ وَالْبُخْلِ وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ غَلَبَةِ الدَّيْنِ وَقَهْرِ الرِّجَالِ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma inni a'udhu bika minal-hammi wal-hazani, wa a'udhu bika minal-'ajzi wal-kasali, wa a'udhu bika minal-jubni wal-bukhli, wa a'udhu bika min ghalabatid-dayni wa qahrir-rijal
duas.translation: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from worry and grief, from helplessness and laziness, from cowardice and miserliness, from being overwhelmed by debt and overpowered by men.

duas.title: Seeking Forgiveness
duas.arabic: أَسْتَغْفِرُ اللَّهَ الْعَظِيمَ الَّذِي لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا هُوَ الْحَيُّ الْقَيُّومُ وَأَتُوبُ إِلَيْهِ
duas.transliteration: Astaghfirullaha al-'Adheem alladhi la ilaha illa Huwal-Hayyul-Qayyum wa atubu ilayh
duas.translation: I seek the forgiveness of Allah the Mighty, whom there is none worthy of worship except Him, the Living, the Sustainer, and I repent to Him.

duas.title: Comprehensive Forgiveness
duas.arabic: رَبَّنَا ظَلَمْنَا أَنْفُسَنَا وَإِنْ لَمْ تَغْفِرْ لَنَا وَتَرْحَمْنَا لَنَكُونَنَّ مِنَ الْخَاسِرِينَ
duas.transliteration: Rabbana dhalamna anfusana wa in lam taghfir lana wa tarhamna lanakoonanna minal-khasireen
duas.translation: Our Lord, we have wronged ourselves, and if You do not forgive us and have mercy upon us, we will surely be among the losers.

duas.title: Visiting the Sick
duas.arabic: لَا بَأْسَ طَهُورٌ إِنْ شَاءَ اللَّهُ
duas.transliteration: La ba'sa tahurun insha'Allah
duas.translation: No harm, it is a purification, if Allah wills.

duas.title: Dua for Healing
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ رَبَّ النَّاسِ أَذْهِبِ الْبَأْسَ اشْفِ أَنْتَ الشَّافِي لَا شِفَاءَ إِلَّا شِفَاؤُكَ شِفَاءً لَا يُغَادِرُ سَقَمًا
duas.transliteration: Allahumma Rabban-nasi, adhibil-ba'sa, ishfi antash-Shafi, la shifa'a illa shifa'uka, shifa'an la yughadiru saqama
duas.translation: O Allah, Lord of mankind, remove the affliction. Cure, for You are the One who cures. There is no cure except Your cure, a cure that leaves no illness behind.

duas.title: When It Rains
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَيِّبًا نَافِعًا
duas.transliteration: Allahumma sayyiban nafi'a
duas.translation: O Allah, let it be a beneficial rain.

duas.title: After Rain
duas.arabic: مُطِرْنَا بِفَضْلِ اللَّهِ وَرَحْمَتِهِ
duas.transliteration: Mutirna bifadlillahi wa rahmatihi
duas.translation: We have been given rain by the grace and mercy of Allah.

duas.title: During Thunder
duas.arabic: سُبْحَانَ الَّذِي يُسَبِّحُ الرَّعْدُ بِحَمْدِهِ وَالْمَلَائِكَةُ مِنْ خِيفَتِهِ
duas.transliteration: Subhanal-ladhi yusabbihur-ra'du bihamdihi wal-mala'ikatu min khifatihi
duas.translation: Glory be to Him whom the thunder glorifies with His praise, and the angels out of fear of Him.

duas.title: Increase in Knowledge
duas.arabic: رَبِّ زِدْنِي عِلْمًا
duas.transliteration: Rabbi zidni 'ilma
duas.translation: My Lord, increase me in knowledge.

duas.title: Dua for Parents
duas.arabic: رَبِّ ارْحَمْهُمَا كَمَا رَبَّيَانِي صَغِيرًا
duas.transliteration: Rabbir-hamhuma kama rabbayani sagheera
duas.translation: My Lord, have mercy upon them as they brought me up when I was small.

duas.title: Istikhara (Seeking Guidance)
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْتَخِيرُكَ بِعِلْمِكَ وَأَسْتَقْدِرُكَ بِقُدْرَتِكَ وَأَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ فَضْلِكَ الْعَظِيمِ فَإِنَّكَ تَقْدِرُ وَلَا أَقْدِرُ وَتَعْلَمُ وَلَا أَعْلَمُ وَأَنْتَ عَلَّامُ الْغُيُوبِ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma inni astakheeruka bi'ilmika wa astaqdiruka biqudratika wa as'aluka min fadlikal-'adheem, fa innaka taqdiru wa la aqdir, wa ta'lamu wa la a'lam, wa anta 'allamul-ghuyub
duas.translation: O Allah, I seek Your guidance by virtue of Your knowledge, and I seek ability by virtue of Your power, and I ask You of Your great bounty. You have power and I have none. And You know and I know not. You are the Knower of hidden things.

duas.title: Thanking Allah
duas.arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ رَبِّ الْعَالَمِينَ
duas.transliteration: Alhamdu lillahi Rabbil-'alameen
duas.translation: All praise is due to Allah, Lord of all the worlds.

duas.title: Seeking Protection from Evil Eye
duas.arabic: أَعُوذُ بِكَلِمَاتِ اللَّهِ التَّامَّةِ مِنْ كُلِّ شَيْطَانٍ وَهَامَّةٍ وَمِنْ كُلِّ عَيْنٍ لَامَّةٍ
duas.transliteration: A'udhu bikalimatillahit-tammati min kulli shaytanin wa hammatin wa min kulli 'aynin lammah
duas.translation: I seek refuge in the perfect words of Allah from every devil and every poisonous reptile, and from every evil eye.

duas.title: General Protection
duas.arabic: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الَّذِي لَا يَضُرُّ مَعَ اسْمِهِ شَيْءٌ فِي الْأَرْضِ وَلَا فِي السَّمَاءِ وَهُوَ السَّمِيعُ الْعَلِيمُ
duas.transliteration: Bismillahilladhi la yadurru ma'asmihi shay'un fil-ardi wa la fis-sama'i wa huwas-sami'ul-'aleem
duas.translation: In the name of Allah, with whose name nothing can cause harm in the earth or in the heavens, and He is the All-Hearing, the All-Knowing.

duas.title: Before Wudu
duas.arabic: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ
duas.transliteration: Bismillah
duas.translation: In the name of Allah.

duas.title: After Wudu
duas.arabic: أَشْهَدُ أَنْ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ وَأَشْهَدُ أَنَّ مُحَمَّدًا عَبْدُهُ وَرَسُولُهُ
duas.transliteration: Ash-hadu an la ilaha illallahu wahdahu la shareeka lahu wa ash-hadu anna Muhammadan 'abduhu wa rasuluh
duas.translation: I bear witness that there is no deity worthy of worship except Allah alone, with no partner, and I bear witness that Muhammad is His slave and messenger.

duas.title: Complete After-Wudu Dua
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اجْعَلْنِي مِنَ التَّوَّابِينَ وَاجْعَلْنِي مِنَ الْمُتَطَهِّرِينَ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma-j'alni minat-tawwabina waj'alni minal-mutatahhirin
duas.translation: O Allah, make me among those who repent and make me among those who purify themselves.

duas.title: When Putting On Clothes
duas.arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي كَسَانِي هَذَا وَرَزَقَنِيهِ مِنْ غَيْرِ حَوْلٍ مِنِّي وَلَا قُوَّةٍ
duas.transliteration: Alhamdu lillahilladhi kasani hadha wa razaqanihi min ghayri hawlin minni wa la quwwah
duas.translation: All praise is for Allah who clothed me with this and provided it for me without any might or power from myself.

duas.title: When Undressing
duas.arabic: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ
duas.transliteration: Bismillah
duas.translation: In the name of Allah.

duas.title: Morning Tasbih
duas.arabic: سُبْحَانَ اللَّهِ وَبِحَمْدِهِ
duas.transliteration: SubhanAllahi wa bihamdih
duas.translation: Glory be to Allah and all praise is His. (Whoever says this 100 times in the morning and evening, no one will come on the Day of Resurrection with a better deed.)

duas.title: Morning Protection with Al-Mu'awwidhat
duas.arabic: قُلْ أَعُوذُ بِرَبِّ الْفَلَقِ
duas.transliteration: Qul a'udhu bi Rabbil-falaq (recite Surah al-Ikhlas, al-Falaq, an-Nas)
duas.translation: Recite Surah al-Ikhlas, al-Falaq, and an-Nas three times each morning for protection throughout the day.

duas.title: Dua for Good Morning
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ بِكَ أَصْبَحْنَا وَبِكَ أَمْسَيْنَا وَبِكَ نَحْيَا وَبِكَ نَمُوتُ وَإِلَيْكَ النُّشُورُ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma bika asbahna wa bika amsayna wa bika nahya wa bika namutu wa ilaykan-nushur
duas.translation: O Allah, by You we enter the morning and by You we enter the evening, by You we live and by You we die, and to You is the resurrection.

duas.title: SubhanAllah al-Adheem Morning
duas.arabic: سُبْحَانَ اللَّهِ الْعَظِيمِ وَبِحَمْدِهِ
duas.transliteration: SubhanAllahil-'Adheem wa bihamdih
duas.translation: Glory be to Allah the Magnificent, and all praise is His. (A tree is planted in Paradise for whoever says this.)

duas.title: Evening Remembrance of Allah
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ بِكَ أَمْسَيْنَا وَبِكَ أَصْبَحْنَا وَبِكَ نَحْيَا وَبِكَ نَمُوتُ وَإِلَيْكَ الْمَصِيرُ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma bika amsayna wa bika asbahna wa bika nahya wa bika namutu wa ilaykal-masir
duas.translation: O Allah, by You we enter the evening and by You we enter the morning, by You we live and by You we die, and to You is the return.

duas.title: Evening Seeking Forgiveness
duas.arabic: أَسْتَغْفِرُ اللَّهَ وَأَتُوبُ إِلَيْهِ
duas.transliteration: Astaghfirullaha wa atubu ilayh
duas.translation: I seek the forgiveness of Allah and I repent to Him.

duas.title: Evening Protection
duas.arabic: أَعُوذُ بِكَلِمَاتِ اللَّهِ التَّامَّاتِ مِنْ شَرِّ مَا خَلَقَ
duas.transliteration: A'udhu bikalimatillahit-tammati min sharri ma khalaq
duas.translation: I seek refuge in the perfect words of Allah from the evil of what He has created.

duas.title: Dua in Ruku
duas.arabic: سُبْحَانَ رَبِّيَ الْعَظِيمِ
duas.transliteration: Subhana Rabbiyal-'Adheem
duas.translation: Glory is to my Lord, the Most Great.

duas.title: Rising from Ruku
duas.arabic: رَبَّنَا وَلَكَ الْحَمْدُ حَمْدًا كَثِيرًا طَيِّبًا مُبَارَكًا فِيهِ
duas.transliteration: Rabbana wa lakal-hamdu hamdan kathiran tayyiban mubarakan fih
duas.translation: Our Lord, and to You is all praise, abundant, pure and blessed praise.

duas.title: Tashahud
duas.arabic: التَّحِيَّاتُ لِلَّهِ وَالصَّلَوَاتُ وَالطَّيِّبَاتُ السَّلَامُ عَلَيْكَ أَيُّهَا النَّبِيُّ وَرَحْمَةُ اللَّهِ وَبَرَكَاتُهُ السَّلَامُ عَلَيْنَا وَعَلَى عِبَادِ اللَّهِ الصَّالِحِينَ أَشْهَدُ أَنْ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَأَشْهَدُ أَنَّ مُحَمَّدًا عَبْدُهُ وَرَسُولُهُ
duas.transliteration: At-tahiyyatu lillahi was-salawatu wat-tayyibat, as-salamu 'alayka ayyuhan-nabiyyu wa rahmatullahi wa barakatuh, as-salamu 'alayna wa 'ala 'ibadillahis-salihin, ash-hadu an la ilaha illallah wa ash-hadu anna Muhammadan 'abduhu wa rasuluh
duas.translation: All greetings, prayers and good things are for Allah. Peace be upon you, O Prophet, and the mercy of Allah and His blessings. Peace be upon us and upon the righteous servants of Allah. I bear witness that there is no deity worthy of worship except Allah, and I bear witness that Muhammad is His slave and messenger.

duas.title: Salawat (Ibrahimiyya) in Prayer
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَعَلَى آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ كَمَا صَلَّيْتَ عَلَى إِبْرَاهِيمَ وَعَلَى آلِ إِبْرَاهِيمَ إِنَّكَ حَمِيدٌ مَجِيدٌ اللَّهُمَّ بَارِكْ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَعَلَى آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ كَمَا بَارَكْتَ عَلَى إِبْرَاهِيمَ وَعَلَى آلِ إِبْرَاهِيمَ إِنَّكَ حَمِيدٌ مَجِيدٌ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma salli 'ala Muhammadin wa 'ala ali Muhammadin kama sallayta 'ala Ibrahima wa 'ala ali Ibrahima innaka Hamidun Majid, Allahumma barik 'ala Muhammadin wa 'ala ali Muhammadin kama barakta 'ala Ibrahima wa 'ala ali Ibrahima innaka Hamidun Majid
duas.translation: O Allah, send prayers upon Muhammad and the family of Muhammad, as You sent prayers upon Ibrahim and the family of Ibrahim. You are indeed Praiseworthy, Glorious. O Allah, bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad, as You blessed Ibrahim and the family of Ibrahim. You are indeed Praiseworthy, Glorious.

duas.title: Dua Before Salam (After Tashahud)
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ عَذَابِ الْقَبْرِ وَمِنْ عَذَابِ النَّارِ وَمِنْ فِتْنَةِ الْمَحْيَا وَالْمَمَاتِ وَمِنْ شَرِّ فِتْنَةِ الْمَسِيحِ الدَّجَّالِ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma inni a'udhu bika min 'adhabil-qabri wa min 'adhabin-nar, wa min fitnatil-mahya wal-mamat, wa min sharri fitnatil-masihid-dajjal
duas.translation: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from the punishment of the grave, from the punishment of the fire, from the trials of life and death, and from the evil of the trial of the False Messiah.

duas.title: La ilaha illallah 10 Times After Fajr and Maghrib
duas.arabic: لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ لَهُ الْمُلْكُ وَلَهُ الْحَمْدُ يُحْيِي وَيُمِيتُ وَهُوَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ
duas.transliteration: La ilaha illallahu wahdahu la shareeka lah, lahul-mulku wa lahul-hamdu yuhyi wa yumitu wa huwa 'ala kulli shay'in qadir
duas.translation: None has the right to be worshipped except Allah, alone, with no partner. To Him belongs all sovereignty and all praise. He gives life and causes death, and He is over all things omnipotent.

duas.title: Dua for Best of This World and Next
duas.arabic: رَبَّنَا آتِنَا فِي الدُّنْيَا حَسَنَةً وَفِي الْآخِرَةِ حَسَنَةً وَقِنَا عَذَابَ النَّارِ
duas.transliteration: Rabbana atina fid-dunya hasanatan wa fil-akhirati hasanatan wa qina 'adhaban-nar
duas.translation: Our Lord, give us good in this world and good in the next, and protect us from the punishment of the Fire.

duas.title: Seeking Refuge After Prayer
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ أَعِنِّي عَلَى ذِكْرِكَ وَشُكْرِكَ وَحُسْنِ عِبَادَتِكَ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma a'inni 'ala dhikrika wa shukrika wa husni 'ibadatik
duas.translation: O Allah, help me to remember You, to be grateful to You, and to worship You in an excellent manner.

duas.title: Reciting Al-Mu'awwidhat Before Sleep
duas.arabic: قُلْ هُوَ اللَّهُ أَحَدٌ
duas.transliteration: Qul Huwallahu Ahad (recite Surah al-Ikhlas, al-Falaq, an-Nas — blow into cupped hands and wipe over body)
duas.translation: Recite Surah al-Ikhlas, al-Falaq, and an-Nas three times, blow into cupped hands, then wipe over the body starting with the head and face.

duas.title: Dua for a Bad Dream
duas.arabic: أَعُوذُ بِاللَّهِ مِنَ الشَّيْطَانِ الرَّجِيمِ
duas.transliteration: A'udhu billahi minash-shaytanir-rajeem
duas.translation: I seek refuge in Allah from the accursed devil. (Spit lightly to the left three times and turn over to the other side upon seeing a bad dream.)

duas.title: Upon Waking at Night
duas.arabic: لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ لَهُ الْمُلْكُ وَلَهُ الْحَمْدُ وَهُوَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ سُبْحَانَ اللَّهِ وَالْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ وَلَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَاللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ وَلَا حَوْلَ وَلَا قُوَّةَ إِلَّا بِاللَّهِ
duas.transliteration: La ilaha illallahu wahdahu la shareeka lah, lahul-mulku wa lahul-hamdu wa huwa 'ala kulli shay'in qadir, SubhanAllahi wal-hamdu lillahi wa la ilaha illallahu wallahu akbar wa la hawla wa la quwwata illa billah
duas.translation: None has the right to be worshipped except Allah, alone, with no partner. To Him belongs all sovereignty and all praise, and He is over all things omnipotent. Glory be to Allah, all praise is due to Allah, none has the right to be worshipped except Allah, Allah is the Greatest, and there is no might or power except with Allah.

duas.title: Upon Seeing a Good Dream
duas.arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ
duas.transliteration: Alhamdulillah
duas.translation: All praise is due to Allah. (Upon seeing a good dream, praise Allah and tell those you love. Do not tell it to those who may be envious.)

duas.title: Dua at Iftar
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ لَكَ صُمْتُ وَعَلَى رِزْقِكَ أَفْطَرْتُ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma laka sumtu wa 'ala rizqika aftartu
duas.translation: O Allah, for You I have fasted and upon Your provision I have broken my fast.

duas.title: Dua When Invited to Eat
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ أَطْعِمْ مَنْ أَطْعَمَنِي وَاسْقِ مَنْ سَقَانِي
duas.transliteration: Allahumma at'im man at'amani wasqi man saqani
duas.translation: O Allah, feed the one who has fed me, and give drink to the one who has given me drink.

duas.title: Dua for the Host
duas.arabic: أَفْطَرَ عِنْدَكُمُ الصَّائِمُونَ وَأَكَلَ طَعَامَكُمُ الْأَبْرَارُ وَصَلَّتْ عَلَيْكُمُ الْمَلَائِكَةُ
duas.transliteration: Aftara 'indakumus-sa'imuna wa akala ta'amakumul-abrar wa sallat 'alaykumul-mala'ikah
duas.translation: May the fasting break their fast with you, may the righteous eat your food, and may the angels send blessings upon you.

duas.title: Stopping at a Place
duas.arabic: أَعُوذُ بِكَلِمَاتِ اللَّهِ التَّامَّاتِ مِنْ شَرِّ مَا خَلَقَ
duas.transliteration: A'udhu bikalimatillahit-tammati min sharri ma khalaq
duas.translation: I seek refuge in the perfect words of Allah from the evil of what He has created. (Whoever says this when stopping at a place will not be harmed until he leaves.)

duas.title: Returning From Travel
duas.arabic: آيِبُونَ تَائِبُونَ عَابِدُونَ لِرَبِّنَا حَامِدُونَ
duas.transliteration: Ayibuna ta'ibuna 'abiduna li Rabbina hamidun
duas.translation: We return, repent, worship and praise our Lord.

duas.title: Dua for the Traveler (From Family at Home)
duas.arabic: أَسْتَوْدِعُ اللَّهَ دِينَكَ وَأَمَانَتَكَ وَخَوَاتِيمَ عَمَلِكَ
duas.transliteration: Astawdi'ullah dinaka wa amanataka wa khawatima 'amalik
duas.translation: I entrust Allah with your religion, your trust, and the ends of your deeds.

duas.title: Dua at the Beginning of a Journey
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنَّا نَسْأَلُكَ فِي سَفَرِنَا هَذَا الْبِرَّ وَالتَّقْوَى وَمِنَ الْعَمَلِ مَا تَرْضَى
duas.transliteration: Allahumma inna nas'aluka fi safarina hadhal-birra wat-taqwa wa minal-'amali ma tarda
duas.translation: O Allah, we ask You on this journey of ours for righteousness and piety, and for deeds that are pleasing to You.

duas.title: Dua After Adhan
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ رَبَّ هَذِهِ الدَّعْوَةِ التَّامَّةِ وَالصَّلَاةِ الْقَائِمَةِ آتِ مُحَمَّدًا الْوَسِيلَةَ وَالْفَضِيلَةَ وَابْعَثْهُ مَقَامًا مَحْمُودًا الَّذِي وَعَدْتَهُ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma Rabba hadhihid-da'watit-tammati was-salatil-qa'ima, ati Muhammadanil-wasilata wal-fadilata wab'ath-hu maqaman mahmudanil-ladhi wa'adtah
duas.translation: O Allah, Lord of this perfect call and the prayer that is to come, grant Muhammad the privilege and the distinction, and raise him to a praised station that You have promised him.

duas.title: Dua While Waiting for Prayer
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اغْفِرْ لِي ذُنُوبِي وَافْتَحْ لِي أَبْوَابَ رَحْمَتِكَ
duas.transliteration: Allahummaghfir li dhunubi waftah li abwaba rahmatik
duas.translation: O Allah, forgive my sins and open for me the doors of Your mercy.

duas.title: Dua of Prophet Ayyub (Job)
duas.arabic: رَبِّ أَنِّي مَسَّنِيَ الضُّرُّ وَأَنْتَ أَرْحَمُ الرَّاحِمِينَ
duas.transliteration: Rabbi anni massaniyad-durru wa anta arhamur-rahimin
duas.translation: My Lord, adversity has touched me, and You are the Most Merciful of the merciful.

duas.title: Hasbunallah
duas.arabic: حَسْبُنَا اللَّهُ وَنِعْمَ الْوَكِيلُ
duas.transliteration: Hasbunallahu wa ni'mal-wakil
duas.translation: Allah is sufficient for us and He is the best disposer of affairs.

duas.title: La Hawla Wa La Quwwata
duas.arabic: لَا حَوْلَ وَلَا قُوَّةَ إِلَّا بِاللَّهِ
duas.transliteration: La hawla wa la quwwata illa billah
duas.translation: There is no might nor power except with Allah. (It is a treasure from the treasures of Paradise.)

duas.title: Dua for Ease in Difficulty
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ لَا سَهْلَ إِلَّا مَا جَعَلْتَهُ سَهْلًا وَأَنْتَ تَجْعَلُ الْحَزْنَ إِذَا شِئْتَ سَهْلًا
duas.transliteration: Allahumma la sahla illa ma ja'altahu sahla wa anta taj'alul-hazna idha shi'ta sahla
duas.translation: O Allah, there is no ease except in that which You have made easy, and You make the difficult easy if You wish.

duas.title: Dua for Laylat al-Qadr
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنَّكَ عَفُوٌّ تُحِبُّ الْعَفْوَ فَاعْفُ عَنِّي
duas.transliteration: Allahumma innaka 'afuwwun tuhibbul-'afwa fa'fu 'anni
duas.translation: O Allah, You are Pardoning and You love to pardon, so pardon me.

duas.title: Dua Between Adhan and Iqamah
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اغْفِرْ لِي وَلِوَالِدَيَّ وَلِلْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَالْمُؤْمِنَاتِ
duas.transliteration: Allahummaghfir li wa liwali dayya wa lil-mu'minina wal-mu'minat
duas.translation: O Allah, forgive me and my parents and the believing men and believing women.

duas.title: Dua of Adam and Hawwa
duas.arabic: رَبَّنَا ظَلَمْنَا أَنْفُسَنَا وَإِنْ لَمْ تَغْفِرْ لَنَا وَتَرْحَمْنَا لَنَكُونَنَّ مِنَ الْخَاسِرِينَ
duas.transliteration: Rabbana dhalamna anfusana wa in lam taghfir lana wa tarhamna lanakoonanna minal-khasireen
duas.translation: Our Lord, we have wronged ourselves, and if You do not forgive us and have mercy upon us, we will surely be among the losers.

duas.title: Ruqyah: Bismillah x3, A'udhu x7
duas.arabic: أَعُوذُ بِاللَّهِ وَقُدْرَتِهِ مِنْ شَرِّ مَا أَجِدُ وَأُحَاذِرُ
duas.transliteration: A'udhu billahi wa qudratihi min sharri ma ajidu wa uhādhir
duas.translation: I seek refuge in Allah and His power from the evil of what I feel and what I am wary of. (Place hand on the area of pain and say Bismillah three times, then this dua seven times.)

duas.title: Dua for Someone Who Is Ill
duas.arabic: أَسْأَلُ اللَّهَ الْعَظِيمَ رَبَّ الْعَرْشِ الْعَظِيمِ أَنْ يَشْفِيَكَ
duas.transliteration: As'alullahil-'Adhima Rabbal-'Arshil-'Adhimi an yashfiyak
duas.translation: I ask Allah the Magnificent, Lord of the Magnificent Throne, to cure you.

duas.title: Dua for Pain in the Body
duas.arabic: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ بِسْمِ اللَّهِ بِسْمِ اللَّهِ
duas.transliteration: Bismillah (x3), then: A'udhu billahi wa qudratihi min sharri ma ajidu wa uhādhir (x7)
duas.translation: In the name of Allah (3 times), then: I seek refuge in Allah and His power from the evil of what I feel and what I am wary of (7 times).

duas.title: Dua for Beneficial Knowledge
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ انْفَعْنِي بِمَا عَلَّمْتَنِي وَعَلِّمْنِي مَا يَنْفَعُنِي وَزِدْنِي عِلْمًا
duas.transliteration: Allahumman-fa'ni bima 'allamtani wa 'allimni ma yanfa'uni wa zidni 'ilma
duas.translation: O Allah, benefit me with what You have taught me, teach me what will benefit me, and increase me in knowledge.

duas.title: Seeking Refuge from Useless Knowledge
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ عِلْمٍ لَا يَنْفَعُ وَمِنْ قَلْبٍ لَا يَخْشَعُ وَمِنْ نَفْسٍ لَا تَشْبَعُ وَمِنْ دَعْوَةٍ لَا يُسْتَجَابُ لَهَا
duas.transliteration: Allahumma inni a'udhu bika min 'ilmin la yanfa'u wa min qalbin la yakhsha'u wa min nafsin la tashba'u wa min da'watin la yustajabu laha
duas.translation: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from knowledge that does not benefit, from a heart that does not fear, from a soul that is not satisfied, and from a supplication that is not answered.

duas.title: Dua for Deceased Parents
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اغْفِرْ لِي وَلِوَالِدَيَّ وَارْحَمْهُمَا كَمَا رَبَّيَانِي صَغِيرًا
duas.transliteration: Allahummaghfir li wa liwali dayya warhamhuma kama rabbayani saghira
duas.translation: O Allah, forgive me and my parents and have mercy on them as they raised me when I was young.

duas.title: Dua for Living Parents' Well-being
duas.arabic: رَبِّ اغْفِرْ لِي وَلِوَالِدَيَّ وَلِمَنْ دَخَلَ بَيْتِيَ مُؤْمِنًا وَلِلْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَالْمُؤْمِنَاتِ
duas.transliteration: Rabbighfir li wa liwali dayya wa liman dakhala bayti mu'minan wa lil-mu'minina wal-mu'minat
duas.translation: My Lord, forgive me, my parents, whoever enters my house as a believer, and all believing men and women.

duas.title: Dua for Steadfastness on the Truth
duas.arabic: يَا مُقَلِّبَ الْقُلُوبِ ثَبِّتْ قَلْبِي عَلَى دِينِكَ
duas.transliteration: Ya Muqallibal-qulub, thabbit qalbi 'ala dinik
duas.translation: O Turner of hearts, keep my heart firm upon Your religion.

duas.title: Dua for Good Character
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ أَحْسَنْتَ خَلْقِي فَأَحْسِنْ خُلُقِي
duas.transliteration: Allahumma ahsanta khalqi fa-ahsin khuluqi
duas.translation: O Allah, You have made my physical form beautiful, so beautify my character too.

duas.title: Dua of Prophet Sulayman for Gratitude
duas.arabic: رَبِّ أَوْزِعْنِي أَنْ أَشْكُرَ نِعْمَتَكَ الَّتِي أَنْعَمْتَ عَلَيَّ وَعَلَى وَالِدَيَّ وَأَنْ أَعْمَلَ صَالِحًا تَرْضَاهُ
duas.transliteration: Rabbi awzi'ni an ashkura ni'matakal-lati an'amta 'alayya wa 'ala walidayya wa an a'mala salihan tardah
duas.translation: My Lord, enable me to be grateful for Your favor which You have bestowed upon me and upon my parents, and to work righteousness of which You will approve.

duas.title: Praising Allah Upon Receiving a Blessing
duas.arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي بِنِعْمَتِهِ تَتِمُّ الصَّالِحَاتُ
duas.transliteration: Alhamdu lillahilladhi bi-ni'matihi tatimus-salihat
duas.translation: All praise is for Allah, by whose blessing all good things are completed.

duas.title: Last Two Verses of Surah al-Baqarah
duas.arabic: آمَنَ الرَّسُولُ بِمَا أُنزِلَ إِلَيْهِ مِن رَّبِّهِ وَالْمُؤْمِنُونَ كُلٌّ آمَنَ بِاللَّهِ وَمَلَائِكَتِهِ وَكُتُبِهِ وَرُسُلِهِ لَا نُفَرِّقُ بَيْنَ أَحَدٍ مِّن رُّسُلِهِ وَقَالُوا سَمِعْنَا وَأَطَعْنَا غُفْرَانَكَ رَبَّنَا وَإِلَيْكَ الْمَصِيرُ
duas.transliteration: Amanar-rasulu bima unzila ilayhi mir-rabbihi wal-mu'minun, kullun amana billahi wa mala'ikatihi wa kutubihi wa rusulihi, la nufarriqu bayna ahadin mir-rusulihi wa qalu sami'na wa ata'na ghufranaka rabbana wa ilaykal-masir
duas.translation: The Messenger has believed in what was revealed to him from his Lord, and so have the believers. All of them have believed in Allah and His angels and His books and His messengers: We make no distinction between any of His messengers. And they say, We hear and we obey. We seek Your forgiveness, our Lord, and to You is the final destination. (Quran 2:285-286)

duas.title: Protection from Dajjal
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ عَذَابِ جَهَنَّمَ وَمِنْ عَذَابِ الْقَبْرِ وَمِنْ فِتْنَةِ الْمَحْيَا وَالْمَمَاتِ وَمِنْ شَرِّ فِتْنَةِ الْمَسِيحِ الدَّجَّالِ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma inni a'udhu bika min 'adhabi jahannam, wa min 'adhabul-qabr, wa min fitnatil-mahya wal-mamat, wa min sharri fitnatil-masihid-dajjal
duas.translation: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from the punishment of Hell, from the punishment of the grave, from the trials of life and death, and from the evil of the trial of the False Messiah.

duas.title: SubhanAllah wa Bihamdihi x100
duas.arabic: سُبْحَانَ اللَّهِ وَبِحَمْدِهِ
duas.transliteration: SubhanAllahi wa bihamdih
duas.translation: Glory be to Allah and all praise is His. (Whoever says this 100 times a day, all their sins will be forgiven even if they are as much as the foam of the sea.)

duas.title: The Best Dhikr
duas.arabic: لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ
duas.transliteration: La ilaha illallah
duas.translation: There is no deity worthy of worship except Allah. (The best dhikr is la ilaha illallah and the best dua is alhamdulillah.)

duas.title: Salawat on the Prophet
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَعَلَى آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma salli 'ala Muhammadin wa 'ala ali Muhammad
duas.translation: O Allah, send blessings upon Muhammad and upon the family of Muhammad. (Whoever sends one salawat upon the Prophet, Allah sends ten blessings upon him.)

duas.title: Hasbiyallah
duas.arabic: حَسْبِيَ اللَّهُ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا هُوَ عَلَيْهِ تَوَكَّلْتُ وَهُوَ رَبُّ الْعَرْشِ الْعَظِيمِ
duas.transliteration: Hasbiyallahu la ilaha illa huwa 'alayhi tawakkaltu wa huwa Rabbul-'Arshil-'Adheem
duas.translation: Allah is sufficient for me. There is no deity worthy of worship except Him. I place my trust in Him and He is the Lord of the Great Throne. (Whoever says this 7 times morning and evening, Allah will take care of whatever worries him.)

duas.title: SubhanAllahil Adheem wa Bihamdihi
duas.arabic: سُبْحَانَ اللَّهِ الْعَظِيمِ وَبِحَمْدِهِ
duas.transliteration: SubhanAllahil-'Adheem wa bihamdih
duas.translation: Glory be to Allah the Magnificent, and all praise is His. (Two words light on the tongue, heavy on the scales, beloved to the Most Merciful.)

duas.title: Complete Tasbih, Tahmid, Takbir
duas.arabic: سُبْحَانَ اللَّهِ وَالْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ وَلَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَاللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ
duas.transliteration: SubhanAllahi wal-hamdu lillahi wa la ilaha illallahu wallahu akbar
duas.translation: Glory be to Allah, all praise is due to Allah, there is no deity worthy of worship except Allah, and Allah is the Greatest.

duas.title: Dua on Seeing Spouse
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ خَيْرَهَا وَخَيْرَ مَا جَبَلْتَهَا عَلَيْهِ وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شَرِّهَا وَشَرِّ مَا جَبَلْتَهَا عَلَيْهِ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma inni as'aluka khayrahā wa khayra ma jabaltaha 'alayhi wa a'udhu bika min sharriha wa sharri ma jabaltaha 'alayh
duas.translation: O Allah, I ask You for her goodness and the goodness of the nature You have created in her, and I seek refuge in You from her evil and the evil of the nature You have created in her.

duas.title: Dua Before Intercourse
duas.arabic: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ اللَّهُمَّ جَنِّبْنَا الشَّيْطَانَ وَجَنِّبِ الشَّيْطَانَ مَا رَزَقْتَنَا
duas.transliteration: Bismillah, Allahumma jannibnash-shaytana wa jannibish-shaytana ma razaqtana
duas.translation: In the name of Allah. O Allah, keep the devil away from us and keep the devil away from what You provide for us. (If a child is conceived, the devil will not harm it.)

duas.title: Dua for a Righteous Spouse and Offspring
duas.arabic: رَبَّنَا هَبْ لَنَا مِنْ أَزْوَاجِنَا وَذُرِّيَّاتِنَا قُرَّةَ أَعْيُنٍ وَاجْعَلْنَا لِلْمُتَّقِينَ إِمَامًا
duas.transliteration: Rabbana hab lana min azwajina wa dhurriyyatina qurrata a'yunin waj'alna lil-muttaqina imama
duas.translation: Our Lord, grant us from among our spouses and offspring comfort to our eyes and make us a leader for the righteous.

duas.title: Dua at a Wedding
duas.arabic: بَارَكَ اللَّهُ لَكَ وَبَارَكَ عَلَيْكَ وَجَمَعَ بَيْنَكُمَا فِي خَيْرٍ
duas.transliteration: Barakallahu laka wa baraka 'alayka wa jama'a baynakuma fi khayr
duas.translation: May Allah bless you, and shower His blessings upon you, and join you together in goodness.

duas.title: Talbiyah
duas.arabic: لَبَّيْكَ اللَّهُمَّ لَبَّيْكَ لَبَّيْكَ لَا شَرِيكَ لَكَ لَبَّيْكَ إِنَّ الْحَمْدَ وَالنِّعْمَةَ لَكَ وَالْمُلْكَ لَا شَرِيكَ لَكَ
duas.transliteration: Labbayk Allahumma labbayk, labbayk la shareeka laka labbayk, innal-hamda wan-ni'mata laka wal-mulk, la shareeka lak
duas.translation: Here I am O Allah, here I am. Here I am, You have no partner, here I am. Verily all praise, grace and sovereignty belong to You. You have no partner.

duas.title: Dua at the Ka'bah (Seeing the Ka'bah)
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ زِدْ هَذَا الْبَيْتَ تَشْرِيفًا وَتَعْظِيمًا وَتَكْرِيمًا وَمَهَابَةً وَزِدْ مَنْ شَرَّفَهُ وَكَرَّمَهُ مِمَّنْ حَجَّهُ أَوِ اعْتَمَرَهُ تَشْرِيفًا وَتَكْرِيمًا وَتَعْظِيمًا وَبِرًّا
duas.transliteration: Allahumma zid hadhal-bayta tashrifan wa ta'dhiman wa takriman wa mahabatan wa zid man sharrafahu wa karramahu mimman hajjahu awi'tamarahu tashrifan wa takriman wa ta'dhiman wa birra
duas.translation: O Allah, increase this House in honour, esteem, respect and reverence, and increase those who honour and respect it — of those who perform Hajj or Umrah — in honour, esteem, reverence and righteousness.

duas.title: Dua at Safa and Marwa
duas.arabic: إِنَّ الصَّفَا وَالْمَرْوَةَ مِنْ شَعَائِرِ اللَّهِ نَبْدَأُ بِمَا بَدَأَ اللَّهُ بِهِ
duas.transliteration: Innas-safa wal-marwata min sha'a'irillah, nabda'u bima bada'allahu bih
duas.translation: Indeed, as-Safa and al-Marwa are among the symbols of Allah. We begin with what Allah began with.

duas.title: Dua at Arafah
duas.arabic: لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ لَهُ الْمُلْكُ وَلَهُ الْحَمْدُ وَهُوَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ
duas.transliteration: La ilaha illallahu wahdahu la shareeka lah, lahul-mulku wa lahul-hamdu wa huwa 'ala kulli shay'in qadir
duas.translation: None has the right to be worshipped except Allah, alone, without partner. To Him belongs all sovereignty and all praise, and He is over all things omnipotent. (The best dua is the dua of the day of Arafah.)

duas.title: Inna Lillahi (Upon a Calamity)
duas.arabic: إِنَّا لِلَّهِ وَإِنَّا إِلَيْهِ رَاجِعُونَ اللَّهُمَّ أْجُرْنِي فِي مُصِيبَتِي وَأَخْلِفْ لِي خَيْرًا مِنْهَا
duas.transliteration: Inna lillahi wa inna ilayhi raji'un, Allahumma-jurni fi musibati wa akhlif li khayran minha
duas.translation: Surely to Allah we belong and to Him we shall return. O Allah, reward me in my calamity and replace it with something better.

duas.title: Dua for the Deceased
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اغْفِرْ لَهُ وَارْحَمْهُ وَعَافِهِ وَاعْفُ عَنْهُ وَأَكْرِمْ نُزُلَهُ وَوَسِّعْ مُدْخَلَهُ وَاغْسِلْهُ بِالْمَاءِ وَالثَّلْجِ وَالْبَرَدِ
duas.transliteration: Allahummaghfir lahu warhamhu wa 'afihi wa'fu 'anhu wa akrim nuzulahu wa wassi' mudkhalahu waghsilhu bil-ma'i wath-thalji wal-barad
duas.translation: O Allah, forgive him and have mercy on him, keep him safe and sound and pardon him, honour the place where he settles, make his entrance wide, wash him with water, snow and hail.

duas.title: Dua for Patience in Grief
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ آجِرْنِي فِي مُصِيبَتِي وَأَعْقِبْنِي خَيْرًا مِنْهَا
duas.transliteration: Allahumma ajirni fi musibati wa a'qibni khayran minha
duas.translation: O Allah, reward me for my affliction and compensate me with something better than it.

duas.title: Dua at the Graveside
duas.arabic: السَّلَامُ عَلَيْكُمْ أَهْلَ الدِّيَارِ مِنَ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَالْمُسْلِمِينَ وَيَرْحَمُ اللَّهُ الْمُسْتَقْدِمِينَ مِنَّا وَالْمُسْتَأْخِرِينَ وَإِنَّا إِنْ شَاءَ اللَّهُ بِكُمْ لَاحِقُونَ
duas.transliteration: As-salamu 'alaykum ahlad-diyari minal-mu'minina wal-muslimeen, wa yarhamullahul-mustaqdimiena minna wal-musta'khireen, wa inna insha'allahu bikum lahiqun
duas.translation: Peace be upon you, O people of the dwellings, from among the believers and Muslims. May Allah have mercy on those who have gone ahead of us and those who are to follow, and verily, if Allah wills, we will join you.

duas.title: Dua for Newborn Protection
duas.arabic: أُعِيذُكَ بِكَلِمَاتِ اللَّهِ التَّامَّةِ مِنْ كُلِّ شَيْطَانٍ وَهَامَّةٍ وَمِنْ كُلِّ عَيْنٍ لَامَّةٍ
duas.transliteration: U'idhuka bikalimatillahit-tammati min kulli shaytanin wa hammatin wa min kulli 'aynin lammah
duas.translation: I seek refuge for you in the perfect words of Allah from every devil and every poisonous reptile and from every evil eye.

duas.title: Dua for Righteous Children
duas.arabic: رَبِّ هَبْ لِي مِنْ لَدُنْكَ ذُرِّيَّةً طَيِّبَةً إِنَّكَ سَمِيعُ الدُّعَاءِ
duas.transliteration: Rabbi hab li min ladunka dhurriyyatan tayyibatan innaka sami'ud-du'a
duas.translation: My Lord, grant me from Yourself a good offspring. Indeed, You are the Hearer of supplication.

duas.title: Dua of Prophet Ibrahim for His Offspring
duas.arabic: رَبِّ اجْعَلْنِي مُقِيمَ الصَّلَاةِ وَمِنْ ذُرِّيَّتِي رَبَّنَا وَتَقَبَّلْ دُعَاءِ
duas.transliteration: Rabbij'alni muqimas-salati wa min dhurriyyati, rabbana wa taqabbal du'a
duas.translation: My Lord, make me an establisher of prayer, and from my descendants. Our Lord, and accept my supplication.

duas.title: Dua Upon Seeing a Newborn
duas.arabic: بَارَكَ اللَّهُ لَكَ فِي الْمَوْهُوبِ لَكَ وَشَكَرْتَ الْوَاهِبَ وَبَلَغَ أَشُدَّهُ وَرُزِقْتَ بِرَّهُ
duas.transliteration: Barakallahu laka fil-mawhubu laka wa shakarta-l-wahiba wa balagha ashuddahu wa ruziqta birrah
duas.translation: May Allah bless you in what has been gifted to you, may you give thanks to the Giver, may he reach maturity, and may you be granted his piety.

duas.title: Dua for Provision (Rizq)
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اكْفِنِي بِحَلَالِكَ عَنْ حَرَامِكَ وَأَغْنِنِي بِفَضْلِكَ عَمَّنْ سِوَاكَ
duas.transliteration: Allahummak-fini bihalali 'an haramika wa aghnini bifadlika 'amman siwak
duas.translation: O Allah, suffice me with what You have made lawful against what You have made unlawful, and make me independent of all others besides You through Your bounty.

duas.title: Dua for Paying Off Debt
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْهَمِّ وَالْحَزَنِ وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْعَجْزِ وَالْكَسَلِ وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْجُبْنِ وَالْبُخْلِ وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ غَلَبَةِ الدَّيْنِ وَقَهْرِ الرِّجَالِ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma inni a'udhu bika minal-hammi wal-hazani wa a'udhu bika minal-'ajzi wal-kasali wa a'udhu bika minal-jubni wal-bukhli wa a'udhu bika min ghalabatid-dayni wa qahrir-rijal
duas.translation: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from anxiety and grief, from helplessness and laziness, from cowardice and miserliness, and from being overwhelmed by debt and subjugated by people.

duas.title: Dua for Barakah in Wealth
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ بَارِكْ لَنَا فِيمَا رَزَقْتَنَا وَقِنَا عَذَابَ النَّارِ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma barik lana fima razaqtana wa qina 'adhaban-nar
duas.translation: O Allah, bless us in what You have provided for us and protect us from the punishment of the Fire.

duas.title: Dua at the Market
duas.arabic: لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ لَهُ الْمُلْكُ وَلَهُ الْحَمْدُ يُحْيِي وَيُمِيتُ وَهُوَ حَيٌّ لَا يَمُوتُ بِيَدِهِ الْخَيْرُ وَهُوَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ
duas.transliteration: La ilaha illallahu wahdahu la shareeka lah, lahul-mulku wa lahul-hamdu yuhyi wa yumitu wa huwa hayyun la yamutu biyadihil-khayru wa huwa 'ala kulli shay'in qadir
duas.translation: None has the right to be worshipped except Allah, alone, without partner. To Him belongs all sovereignty and all praise. He gives life and causes death. He is living and does not die. In His hand is all goodness and He is over all things omnipotent. (Allah will write a million good deeds for whoever says this at the market.)

duas.title: Dua at Tahajjud
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ لَكَ الْحَمْدُ أَنْتَ نُورُ السَّمَوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضِ وَمَنْ فِيهِنَّ وَلَكَ الْحَمْدُ أَنْتَ قَيِّمُ السَّمَوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضِ وَمَنْ فِيهِنَّ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma lakal-hamdu anta nurus-samawati wal-ardi wa man fihinn, wa lakal-hamdu anta qayyimus-samawati wal-ardi wa man fihinn
duas.translation: O Allah, all praise is due to You. You are the Light of the heavens and the earth and whoever is in them. All praise is due to You. You are the Sustainer of the heavens and the earth and whoever is in them.

duas.title: Witr Qunut
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اهْدِنِي فِيمَنْ هَدَيْتَ وَعَافِنِي فِيمَنْ عَافَيْتَ وَتَوَلَّنِي فِيمَنْ تَوَلَّيْتَ وَبَارِكْ لِي فِيمَا أَعْطَيْتَ وَقِنِي شَرَّ مَا قَضَيْتَ
duas.transliteration: Allahummahdini fiman hadayt, wa 'afini fiman 'afayt, wa tawallani fiman tawallayt, wa barik li fima a'tayt, wa qini sharra ma qadayt
duas.translation: O Allah, guide me along with those whom You have guided, pardon me along with those whom You have pardoned, be an ally to me along with those whom You are an ally to, and bless me in what You have given me, and protect me from the evil of what You have decreed.

duas.title: Dua for Laylat al-Qadr
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنَّكَ عَفُوٌّ تُحِبُّ الْعَفْوَ فَاعْفُ عَنِّي
duas.transliteration: Allahumma innaka 'afuwwun tuhibbul-'afwa fa'fu 'anni
duas.translation: O Allah, You are Pardoning and You love to pardon, so pardon me.

duas.title: Opening of Tahajjud Prayer
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ رَبَّ جِبْرَائِيلَ وَمِيكَائِيلَ وَإِسْرَافِيلَ فَاطِرَ السَّمَوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضِ عَالِمَ الْغَيْبِ وَالشَّهَادَةِ أَنْتَ تَحْكُمُ بَيْنَ عِبَادِكَ فِيمَا كَانُوا فِيهِ يَخْتَلِفُونَ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma Rabba Jibra'ila wa Mika'ila wa Israfila, Fatiras-samawati wal-ardi, 'alimal-ghaybi wash-shahadati, anta tahkumu bayna 'ibadika fima kanu fihi yakhtalifun
duas.translation: O Allah, Lord of Jibreel, Mikail and Israfeel, Creator of the heavens and the earth, Knower of the unseen and the seen. You judge between Your servants in matters in which they differed.

duas.title: Before Reciting the Quran
duas.arabic: أَعُوذُ بِاللَّهِ مِنَ الشَّيْطَانِ الرَّجِيمِ
duas.transliteration: A'udhu billahi minash-shaytanir-rajeem
duas.translation: I seek refuge in Allah from the accursed devil.

duas.title: Al-Fatiha (Opening Chapter)
duas.arabic: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الرَّحْمَنِ الرَّحِيمِ الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ رَبِّ الْعَالَمِينَ الرَّحْمَنِ الرَّحِيمِ مَالِكِ يَوْمِ الدِّينِ إِيَّاكَ نَعْبُدُ وَإِيَّاكَ نَسْتَعِينُ اهْدِنَا الصِّرَاطَ الْمُسْتَقِيمَ صِرَاطَ الَّذِينَ أَنْعَمْتَ عَلَيْهِمْ غَيْرِ الْمَغْضُوبِ عَلَيْهِمْ وَلَا الضَّالِّينَ
duas.transliteration: Bismillahir-Rahmanir-Rahim, Alhamdu lillahi Rabbil-'alamin, Ar-Rahmanir-Rahim, Maliki yawmid-din, Iyyaka na'budu wa iyyaka nasta'in, Ihdinas-siratal-mustaqim, Siratal-ladhina an'amta 'alayhim, ghayril-maghdubi 'alayhim wa lad-dallin
duas.translation: In the name of Allah, the Entirely Merciful, the Especially Merciful. All praise is due to Allah, Lord of the worlds — the Entirely Merciful, the Especially Merciful, Sovereign of the Day of Recompense. It is You we worship and You we ask for help. Guide us to the straight path — the path of those upon whom You have bestowed favour, not of those who have evoked anger or of those who are astray.

duas.title: Dua Upon Completing the Quran
duas.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ اللَّهُمَّ وَبِحَمْدِكَ أَشْهَدُ أَنْ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ أَسْتَغْفِرُكَ وَأَتُوبُ إِلَيْكَ
duas.transliteration: SubhanakaAllahumma wa bihamdika ash-hadu an la ilaha illa anta astaghfiruka wa atubu ilayk
duas.translation: Glory be to You O Allah and all praise, I bear witness that there is no deity worthy of worship except You. I seek Your forgiveness and I repent to You.
